WHAT IS INCLUDED IN THE QUANTUM RECRUITING
BLUEPRINT?

THE PLAYBOOK

Here's EXACTLY what you will get:

  • 3 ways to get coaches to reply in 24 hrs
  • EMAIL, TWITTER and TEXT templates to send to coaches with proof that I used them to get replies
  • What coaches to follow on Twitter
  • How to set up your Twitter profile (bio, profile etc.)
  • How to post on Twitter — what and when to post and features to include in your post
  • How to make a D1 highlight reel
  • Which camps to attend

THE BOOTCAMP

Here's EXACTLY what you will get:

  • A series of 20 in depth videos teaching you how to get recruited
  • Walkthrough of the systems, strategies, and actions I used myself
  • More detail than The Playbook alone so nothing is confusing
  • Helps athletes take action instead of just reading information
  • Built to give athletes clarity, direction, and a real recruiting game plan
  • Designed to help athletes move faster and make fewer mistakes

THE PERSONALIZED PLAN

What is it?

  • Personalized plan built as a stepping stone from where the athlete is now to the goals they want to reach
  • Includes a personalized daily checklist based on the athlete's current position and recruiting goals
  • Focused on what the athlete needs to do to actually get recruited
  • Centers on recruiting actions, not just becoming a better football player
  • Includes an accountability system to make sure the athlete is doing what they need to do every day
  • Gives the athlete a clear path to follow with daily direction and structure

ABOUT TUCKER

TUCKER KELLEHER

I've been on both sides. As an overlooked athlete and a heavily recruited athlete, I learned a lot. Instead of keeping it to myself, I wanted to share the information I learned over the course of four years to other aspiring college football players.

If you want scholarship offers but don't know how to get them, you're in the right place.
